'''Grond''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Military]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Corellian/Legends|Native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], Grond was a [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racer]] in his youth prior to his service with the Imperial Military. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he was stationed on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], he awaited the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] and [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] arrivals aboard the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Shortly afterward, Grond took part in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and helped to lead the defense of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Endor shield generator bunker|shield generator bunker]].

==Biography==
[[File:Grond.png|thumb|left|250px|Grond (third from left) was one of the Imperials present for Darth Vader's arrival aboard the Death Star.]]
The [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="ROTJ" /> Grond [[Corellian/Legends|hailed]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and grew up [[Swoop racing/Legends|racing]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]]. At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he was part of the [[Emperor's Demonstration Team]], a specialized unit in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]].<ref name="card" /> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] to the beginning of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> he had become a [[Scout/Legends|scout]]<ref name="Death Star II personnel">{{SW|url=news/death-star-ii-personnel-and-imperial-human-resources|text=Death Star II Personnel: An Imperial Human Resources Guide|nolive=1}}</ref> and a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] serving as an [[Aide/Legends|aide]] of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Dyer/Legends|Dyer]],<ref name="card" /> who helped oversee the fortification of<ref name="dyer">{{CCG|set=Endor Limited|cardname=Colonel Dyer}}</ref> the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star's]] [[Endor shield generator bunker|shield generator bunker]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].<ref name="ROTJ" />

That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="NEC" /> Grond awaited the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] arrival aboard the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Upon his arrival, the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] ordered the [[Battle station/Legends|station's]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tiaan Jerjerrod/Legends|Tiaan Jerjerrod]], to speed up the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon's]] construction.<ref name="ROTJ" /> Grond shortly afterwards stood in one of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bays alongside Vader and other [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] to await the arrival of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] aboard the battlestation.<ref name="Topps">{{Topps|set=1983 Topps Star Wars: Return of the Jedi Series 1|cardname=On the Death Star|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/72969/cid/5256904/1983-Topps-Return-Of-The-Jedi-54-On-the-Death-Star}}</ref> A short [[Time/Legends|time]] later, Grond took part in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] on the forest moon,<ref name="cswe">{{CSWECite|I|371|Grond (2)}}</ref> where he organized [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout trooper]] patrols<ref name="Fact File">{{FactFile|11|END 7-10|The Battle of Endor}}</ref> and coordinated both scout movements<ref name="card" /> and the actions to help lead the Imperial defense of the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]].<ref name="cswe" /> Nevertheless, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] destroyed both the generator and the Death Star battlestation.<ref name="ROTJ" />

==Personality and traits==
Grond was a fair-skinned Human with [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="ROTJ" />

==Equipment==
During his time as a lieutenant, Grond wore a black [[Imperial Navy crewman]]'s uniform and [[Hat/Legends|cap]].<ref name="ROTJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Grond first appeared as one of the Imperial extras<ref name="ROTJ" />—portrayed by an uncredited [[Rodney Cardiff]] according to actor [[Kenneth Coombs]]<ref name="Cardiff ref">Actor [[Kenneth Coombs]] [https://starwars.fandom.com/nl/wiki/Bestand:Ken2.PNG revealed in an email] that [[Rodney Cardiff]] was the actor who played Grond in {{Film|VI}}.</ref>—awaiting Darth Vader's arrival on the second Death Star in the beginning of the [[1983]] film {{Film|VI}}.<ref name="ROTJ" /> He was named and given a brief backstory on a card of the [[1999]] ''[[Endor Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="card" />

According to an on-set photo shown first by a card for ''[[1983 Topps Star Wars: Return of the Jedi Series 1]]'', Grond was meant to appear in at least one more scene in ''Return of the Jedi'', among the extras standing in a docking bay with Vader and Jerjerrod to await Palpatine's arrival on the Death Star.<ref name="Topps" />

In the [[1997]] [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|''Special Edition'']] release of {{Film|V}}, footage of Darth Vader's arrival aboard the second Death Star in the opening scene of ''Return of the Jedi'' was reused to show Vader arriving aboard his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], following his [[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|duel]] with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on the planet [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Because of the scene's inclusion, Rodney Cardiff is visible aboard the ''Executor'' along with other extras who portrayed the Imperial [[Officer/Legends|officers]] in the beginning of ''Return of the Jedi''.<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref>
